one_liner: Supabase provides a self-serve Postgres-backed backend platform (REST/GraphQL API, Auth, Storage, Realtime) secured via API keys and JWTs, with an official hosted MCP server for AI agent integration.

auth_methods.notes: apikey header using anon (public) or service_role (private) key for REST/Auth endpoints
JWT Bearer access token (Authorization header) obtained via /auth/v1/token, used for user-scoped requests
MCP server uses browser-based OAuth flow for client authorization; personal access tokens supported for CI use

self_serve_notes: Free tier available with no credit card required; unlimited API access on all plans including Free (2 active projects, auto-paused after inactivity). Self-serve signup and key generation via dashboard.

api_surface.notes: Supabase exposes REST (PostgREST-based) and GraphQL APIs plus Auth, Storage, Realtime, and Edge Functions endpoints; also offers client SDKs across multiple languages.

evidence.supports: Details API key (anon/service_role) and JWT bearer token authentication methods for REST/Auth endpoints
Free tier with unlimited API access, no credit card required, self-serve project creation
Documents Supabase Auth capabilities including password, MFA, anonymous sign-in supporting broad API surface
Comprehensive API reference covering authentication, user management, MFA, admin, SSO/SAML, and OAuth server endpoints

flags: Official hosted MCP server exists at mcp.supabase.com, reducing need for custom build
Service_role key grants full DB access and bypasses RLS—must be handled server-side only, security-sensitive for agent tooling
